description_long: This is a charming, small two-story ice cream shop with a tiled, sloped roof in a pale yellow color. The front facade features two large windows on the upper floor, a round wall clock, and a prominent awning above the entrance. Below the awning, there is a chalkboard sign advertising ice cream, a round table with two chairs, and a large potted plant, all set on a yellow mat. A tall, metallic chimney runs up the right side of the building, adding a touch of industrial character. The shop sits on a dark rectangular base, and the overall design is quaint and inviting, with soft pastel tones and simple, clean lines.
description: A quaint two-story ice cream shop with a yellow tiled roof, front awning, outdoor seating, and a tall chimney, exuding a cozy and inviting atmosphere.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance, awning, chalkboard sign, outdoor table and chairs, potted plant, and upper windows with a clock.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the tall chimney, the side wall, and partial visibility of the outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall and the tiled roof, with no windows or decorative features.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the sloped roof, side wall, and a glimpse of the front awning and outdoor seating.
attribute_signage: A chalkboard sign with the word 'GELATO' and a menu is placed on the front left side under the awning; the signage is hand-drawn and clearly legible.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A service counter is present at the front entrance, partially sheltered by a yellow awning, easily accessible from the sidewalk.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Outdoor seating includes a round table and two chairs placed on a mat in front of the shop, arranged for customer use.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro European with rustic elements, characterized by a tiled roof, pastel colors, and simple, homey details.
